case_title: IBARRA PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION VS. FUHUI ZHANG

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-19-2019 - APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY, PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. AFTER HEARING THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT TAKES THIS MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED BY THE COURT. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-19-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IBARRA PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ZHANG, FUHUI STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF IBARRA PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT ZHANG, FUHUI

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-26-2018 - CONTINUED FOR STATUS OF THE STAY TO MAR-19-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. THIS ACTION IS AUTOMATICALLY STAYED PURSUANT TO BUSINESS & PROFESSIONAL CODE 6201(C). THE PARTIES WILL APPRISE THE COURT BY THE MARCH 19, 2019 HEARING. IF NO PARTY REPORTS BACK REGARDING THE STAY, THE ACTION WILL BE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN, CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN, NOT REPORTED. (506)
NOTICE OF STAY OF PROCEEDINGS FILED BY PLAINTIFF IBARRA PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF IBARRA PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,149.00 FILED BY IBARRA PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT ZHANG, FUHUI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-26-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR STATUS OF THE STAY (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-01-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ZHANG, FUHUI

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF IBARRA PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION
